title: 'achaz #0270
definition:
1) grasp, take hold, seize, take possession
   1a) (Qal) to grasp, take hold of
   1b) (Niphal) to be caught, grasped, be settled
   1c) (Piel) to enclose, overlay
   1d) (Hophal) fastened
nasbUsage:
